name: AppLovin / Unity Ads

specs.sdk_logic: Deep integration with game level data

platform_exclusive_logic.Frictionless_Trial: The Playable must be a simplified, 'hyper-rewarding' version of the actual game.
platform_exclusive_logic.The_Click_Trap: A small, easy interaction (e.g., 'Drag to Merge') that leads to an immediate 'Big Win' screen.
platform_exclusive_logic.Algorithm_Matching: Create multiple versions of the same gameplay with different 'Difficulty Levels' (Easy/Medium/Hard).

psychological_hooks: Instant Gratification: Let them win a hard battle in the first 10 seconds of the playable.
The Endowment Effect: Once they start the playable, they feel they've 'invested' time and want the reward (the actual game).
The 'One More Try' Loop: If they fail the playable, offer a 'Retry' button that leads to the App Store.
